text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Curren, what kind of fan service do you do during
winning concerts?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, I don't really have a set routine. Maybe I
should come up with one.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Then let's make one right now! I'll even give you
some professional advice! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow, really? Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: In that case, I'll start off with what I normally do.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Keep your eyes on me and ooonly me! Okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's all I've got... I bet it's a little boring,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
N-no... it's perfect just the way it is! Everything
from your tone to your pose was flawless! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Aw, thank you! I'm glad I got your seal of
approval. ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That was her normal routine? Curren... Just who
are you?!
